cell.task_description: Rewrite a short news passage to be very brief (~40 words). A better attempt preserves more of the named facts from the source passage (dates, names, dollar amounts, locations) while staying concise.

pricing_snapshot.purpose: Frozen provider pricing snapshot for LoopGain Bench cost computation. Per BENCH_PROTOCOL.md methodology lockdown #1, this file is committed at bench start and not modified during the run. All $-per-task numbers reported in bench results are computed against these rates.
notes: Standard rates only. No batch-API discount applied (bench is real-time, not batched).
No prompt-caching discount applied. If a cell enables prompt caching, that cell MUST disclose it and use the cached rates explicitly.
Prices are USD per 1,000,000 tokens. To compute trial cost: (input_tokens * input_per_million + output_tokens * output_per_million) / 1_000_000.
Embedding models charge a single rate regardless of input/output (embeddings have no output tokens in the completion sense).
